𝟭𝗛𝗢𝗦𝗧𝗦 | To provide users with comprehensive DNS blocklists that can be easily integrated into their existing network or device configurations to block unwanted content like ads, trackers, and malware.  🔥 Super Hot!

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 💻 HTML 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide users with comprehensive DNS blocklists that can be easily integrated into their existing network or device configurations to block unwanted content like ads, trackers, and malware.
📅 Created: Oct 2019 • Updated: Jun 2026

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Multiple blocklist variants (Lite, Xtra)
✅ Support for various clients and formats (AdAway, Pi-hole, dnscrypt-proxy, uBlock Origin, AdGuardHome, dnsmasq, Unbound, Windows hosts file, Little Snitch)
✅ Multiple mirrors for blocklist availability
✅ Focus on privacy, security, and ad/tracker/malware blocking


⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 2.1K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 119 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 755 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

1Hosts provides curated DNS blocklists designed to enhance privacy, security, and user experience by filtering out ads, trackers, and malware. It offers different variants and formats compatible with various DNS filtering software and operating systems.

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/badmojr/1Hosts

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗨𝗫-𝗔𝗡𝗗𝗥𝗢𝗜𝗗 | Repurposing old Android phones into Linux desktops or smart home servers.  🔥 Super Hot!

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 💻 Shell 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Repurposing old Android phones into Linux desktops or smart home servers.
📅 Created: Mar 2026 • Updated: Jun 2026

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Install Linux desktop environments (XFCE4, LXQt, MATE, KDE Plasma) on Android via Termux
✅ Set up Home Assistant for smart home control
✅ No root or PC required
✅ Supports GPU acceleration on Qualcomm Snapdragon chips
✅ Provides scripts to start and stop the Linux environment
✅ Works on stock Android


▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 2K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 168 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 1 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

This repository provides shell scripts to install and run a full Linux desktop environment or a Home Assistant smart home server on an Android device using Termux. It allows repurposing old Android phones without requiring root access or a PC.

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/mayukh4/linux-android

𝗢𝗣𝗘𝗡-𝗟𝗟𝗠-𝗩𝗧𝗨𝗕𝗘𝗥 | To create a personal, interactive AI companion with a visual avatar that can be controlled and conversed with using natural voice commands, running locally for privacy and accessibility.  🌟 Rising Fast!

♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To create a personal, interactive AI companion with a visual avatar that can be controlled and conversed with using natural voice commands, running locally for privacy and accessibility.
📅 Created: Nov 2023 • Updated: Jun 2026

♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Hands-free voice interaction
✅ Voice interruption
✅ Live2D avatar integration
✅ Local execution (offline support)
✅ Cross-platform compatibility
✅ Real-time voice conversations
✅ Visual perception capabilities


♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 11.9K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 1.4K 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 93 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Open-LLM-VTuber is a Python-based project enabling hands-free, voice-interactive AI companions with Live2D avatars. It supports real-time conversations, voice interruption, and can run entirely offline on local machines across different platforms.

♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/Open-LLM-VTuber/Open-LLM-VTuber

𝗕𝗔𝗕𝗬𝗦𝗜𝗧𝗧𝗘𝗥 | To provide a framework for building and managing reliable, auditable, and controlled AI agent workflows, ensuring they execute tasks precisely as defined and preventing unintended or erroneous actions.  🔥 Super Hot!

♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📜 JavaScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide a framework for building and managing reliable, auditable, and controlled AI agent workflows, ensuring they execute tasks precisely as defined and preventing unintended or erroneous actions.
📅 Created: Jan 2026 • Updated: Jun 2026

♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Enforces obedience on agentic workforces
✅ Manages complex tasks and workflows
✅ Deterministic, hallucination-free self-orchestration
✅ Ensures quality gates pass before progression
✅ Requires human approval at breakpoints
✅ Records every decision in an immutable journal
✅ Supports multiple AI coding harnesses (Claude Code, Codex CLI, Cursor, Gemini, GitHub Copilot, Pi, Oh-My-Pi, OpenCode)
✅ Includes an internal harness for programmatic execution without external AI agents


♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 1.4K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 81 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 84 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Babysitter is a JavaScript library designed to enforce strict obedience and deterministic execution within AI agent workforces. It enables the management of complex tasks and workflows by ensuring agents follow predefined steps, pass quality gates, and undergo human approval when necessary, all while maintaining an immutable record of decisions.

♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/a5c-ai/babysitter

♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

𝗛𝗘𝗥𝗠𝗘𝗦-𝗪𝗘𝗕𝗨𝗜 | To provide a convenient and accessible web-based interface for interacting with the Hermes Agent, mirroring its full command-line functionality.  🌟 Rising Fast!

┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide a convenient and accessible web-based interface for interacting with the Hermes Agent, mirroring its full command-line functionality.
📅 Created: Mar 2026 • Updated: Jun 2026

┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Web-based interface for Hermes Agent
✅ Full CLI parity
✅ Three-panel layout (sidebar, chat, workspace)
✅ Composer footer for controls
✅ Circular context ring for token usage
✅ Hermes Control Center for settings
✅ Dark theme
✅ Mobile accessibility


┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 15K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 1.9K 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 186 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Hermes WebUI provides a lightweight, dark-themed web interface for the Hermes Agent, offering full parity with its CLI experience. It allows users to interact with the autonomous agent through a browser, managing sessions, workspaces, and configurations with a user-friendly three-panel layout.

┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/nesquena/hermes-webui
